examples: The American flyers sprinted for their planes and got into the cockpit.
I reached the cockpit and directed the extinguisher at the fire without effect.
They lowered him gradually into the cockpit. Somehow they squeezed him in the tight space, and strapped him in.
Some parts are missing - the bomb bay doors, the cockpit glazing, the undercarriage doors.
Few perches provide more dramatic vistas than that of the cockpit of an airplane.
